'''Bittercap Mushroom''' is a resource item.

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Bittercap Mushroom}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
While many mushrooms are poisonous, the Bittercap Mushroom turns against the defences of its kin and is an ingredient in several poison remedies.
}}
